summary: Comprehensive testing of Variable Hour Bank Module. All backend APIs working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend Hour Bank tab and Reports page Hour Bank Deficiency section fully functional. Full flow tested: CSV upload → balance verification → plan threshold configuration → monthly calculation → member status change → deficiency report.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/hour-bank/upload-work-report accepts CSV and inserts entries
✅ Backend: GET /api/hour-bank/MBR001 returns ledger with current_balance, threshold, max_bank, hours_until_deficit, entries
✅ Backend: GET /api/hour-bank/MBR201307 returns ledger for another member
✅ Backend: GET /api/hour-bank/NONEXISTENT returns 404
✅ Backend: POST /api/hour-bank/run-monthly runs calculation and returns activated/termed/unchanged counts
✅ Backend: POST /api/hour-bank/run-monthly?period=2026-03 accepts period parameter
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/hour-bank-deficiency returns at-risk members list
✅ Backend: PlanCreate/Update accepts eligibility_threshold and hour_bank_max fields
✅ Backend: Adjudication code path exists for termed_insufficient_hours denial with EOB note
✅ Frontend: Members page > click member > Hour Bank tab loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab shows balance summary (Remaining Balance, Monthly Threshold, Max Bank, Cushion)
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab shows ledger entries with green TrendingUp icons for work hours
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab shows ledger entries with red TrendingDown icons for monthly deductions
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank tab shows running balance for each entry
✅ Frontend: Reports page has Hour Bank Deficiency section at bottom
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank Deficiency shows '5 at risk' badge when members are at risk
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank Deficiency table shows member details, balance, threshold, cushion, status
✅ Frontend: Termed members show red 'Termed' badge with warning icon
✅ Frontend: Hour Bank balance counter uses tabular-nums class (no layout jitter)
✅ Frontend: Balance summary cards have fixed height h-[72px]
✅ Frontend: Ledger entries have fixed height h-[44px]
✅ Full flow: Upload work report → verify balance → configure plan threshold → run monthly → check member status
seed_data_creation: Uploaded work hours CSV for MBR001 (40.5 + 35.0 hrs). Temporarily configured plan with eligibility_threshold=120, hour_bank_max=500 for testing, then reset to 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hour Bank Module fully tested. Key test data: MBR001 has hour bank entries from CSV uploads. The plan 432da0cd-cd15-48f0-b140-99ab204a95e6 was used for testing threshold configuration. Monthly calculation was run for period 2026-03. Test members (TEST_RETRO_*, TEST_AGEOUT_*, etc.) were termed due to insufficient hours during testing. Plan threshold has been reset to 0 after testing.

hour_bank_verification.adjudication_eob_note: Coverage suspended due to hour bank deficit.

layout_jitter_prevention.fixed_heights: h-[72px] for summary cards, h-[44px] for ledger entries
